item.name: Update Product (JSON)
item.description:
Partially update a product using JSON body.

Variants merge behaviour (as of fix/variant-inventory-sync):
- Items with id matching an existing variant: updated in-place; inventory row and stock counts preserved.
- Items without id (or unknown id): created as new variants; inventory row auto-created via ProductUpdatedEvent.
- Existing variants whose id is absent from the array: soft-deleted (deletedAt set); inventory row kept for order history.
- Omitting the variants field entirely: variants left unchanged.

The third variant entry in this example (no id) demonstrates adding a new variant in the same call.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Updated Product Name",
  "sku": "PROD-001-UPDATED",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "costPrice": 55,
  "discountedPrice": 49,
  "trackInventory": true,
  "requiresShipping": true,
  "status": "active",
  "variants": [
    {
      "id": "{{variantId}}",
      "color": "AF2E1B",
      "size": "S",
      "price": 55,
      "quantity": 20,
      "isActive": true
    },
    {
      "id": "{{variantId2}}",
      "color": "CC6324",
      "size": "L",
      "price": 60,
      "quantity": 30,
      "isActive": true
    },
    {
      "color": "3A7D44",
      "size": "M",
      "price": 58,
      "quantity": 15,
      "isActive": true
    }
  ]
}

{
  "name": "Updated Product Name",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "costPrice": 55,
  "discountedPrice": 49,
  "stockQuantity": 80,
  "trackInventory": true,
  "requiresShipping": true,
  "status": "active",
  "variants": [
    { "color": "AF2E1B", "size": "S", "price": 55, "quantity": 20, "isActive": true },
    { "color": "CC6324", "size": "L", "price": 60, "quantity": 30, "isActive": true }
  ],
  "bundleItems": []
}

formdata.description: JSON string — variant merge/replace. Items with "id" matching an existing variant are updated in-place (inventory preserved). Items without "id" are created as new variants. Existing variants absent from this array are soft-deleted. Omit the key entirely to leave variants unchanged.
JSON array of child product UUIDs — full replacement. Send as a JSON string in form-data.
One or more image files (max 8 total per product)
One or more image files (max 8 total per product)

item.name: Open Conversation As Buyer
item.description: Buyer opens (or reuses) a chat with a specific supplier on this RFQ. Idempotent — same buyer/supplier/RFQ returns the same conversationId. 403 on directed RFQs if supplierId is not the targeted supplier; 409 if the RFQ is cancelled.

item.name: Open Conversation As Supplier
item.description: Supplier opens (or reuses) a chat with the buyer on this RFQ. Idempotent. Requires fully-verified supplier session.

item.name: Messaging
item.description: Conversations and messages over RFQ subjects. Auth via session cookie. Realtime delivery is provided by the Socket.IO namespace `/messaging` (see Messaging WebSocket notes at the bottom of this folder's description).

item.name: List My Conversations
item.description: Returns conversations the authenticated user participates in, optionally filtered by subject type.

item.name: Get Conversation
item.description: Returns a single conversation with participants and metadata. 403 if the caller is not a participant.

item.name: List Messages
item.description: Returns messages for a conversation, newest-first. Use `before` (a message UUID) to paginate older messages.

query.description: Optional. UUID of a message to paginate before.

item.name: Send Message
item.description: Sends a message in a conversation. Body 1–4000 chars. 403 if not a participant. 409 if the underlying RFQ is cancelled (read-only conversation). Fans out `message:new` and `conversation:updated` over the `/messaging` Socket.IO namespace.

item.name: Mark Conversation Read
item.description: Advances the caller's read marker up to and including the given message UUID. Counterpart's unread count is unaffected.

exec: //   Auth: session cookie (handshake rejected without it)
//     message:send       { conversationId, body } → ack { ok, message?, error? }
//     message:new            { conversationId, message:{ _id, senderId, body, createdAt } }

item.name: Clients
item.description: Supplier-facing client management. All routes require a supplier session (SessionAuthGuard + IsFullyVerifiedSupplier). The buyerId path param is the buyer's public UUID.

item.name: List Clients
item.description: Returns paginated buyers with paid/fulfilled orders for this supplier plus summary KPIs. Set buyerId variable from first item.

item.name: List Clients — Active + VIP filter
item.description: Filter to active buyers (last order <= 60 days ago) with classification VIP (lifetime >= 250K SAR).

item.name: List Clients — Inactive + PERMANENT filter
item.description: Filter to inactive buyers (last order > 60 days ago) with PERMANENT classification (>= 5 orders, < 250K SAR).

item.name: List Clients — Search
item.description: Full-text search on buyer name and email (ILIKE). Replace search value with a known buyer name fragment.

item.name: List Clients — Country filter (SA)
item.description: Filter buyers with country = SA.

item.name: List Clients — dateAdded last 30 days
item.description: Filter buyers whose first order with this supplier was in the last 30 days.

item.name: List Clients — page 2
item.description: Pagination: second page. Verify page field reflects the requested page.

item.name: Get Client Header
item.description: Returns buyer profile header for {{buyerId}}. 404 if buyer has no orders with this supplier.

item.name: Get Client Header — 404 unknown buyer
item.description: A nil UUID must return 404 — no enumeration of other suppliers' buyers.

item.name: Get Client Stats
item.description: Returns totalOrders, lifetimeValueSar, creditLimitSar (100K placeholder), responseRate (null phase-2).

item.name: Get Client Orders
item.description: Paginated list of trade_orders for this buyer↔supplier pair, ordered by created_at DESC.

item.name: Get Client Orders — page 2
item.description: Pagination sanity check on orders tab.

item.name: Get Client Quotations
item.description: Paginated supplier quotations sent for RFQs from this buyer.

item.name: Get Client Sample Requests (stub)
item.description: Phase-1 stub. Must return empty items array and 404 for unknown buyerId.

item.name: Get Client Chat Threads (stub)
item.description: Phase-1 stub. Must return empty items array.

item.name: Get Client Notes (stub)
item.description: Phase-1 stub. Must return empty items array.

item.name: List Clients — Unauthenticated (401)
item.description: Regression: no session cookie must return 401.

item.name: Get Client Header — Unauthenticated (401)
item.description: Regression: no session cookie must return 401.

item.name: Inquiries
item.description: Inquiry context — buyer list, supplier incoming, detail, reply, close

item.name: List My Inquiries (buyer)
item.description: GET /inquiries/me

item.name: List Incoming Inquiries (supplier)
item.description: GET /inquiries/incoming

item.name: Get Inquiry Detail
item.description: GET /inquiries/:inquiryId

item.name: Mark Inquiry Replied (supplier)
item.description: PATCH /inquiries/:inquiryId/reply

item.name: Close Inquiry (buyer)
item.description: PATCH /inquiries/:inquiryId/close

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification context — list, mark read, mark all read

item.name: List Notifications
item.description: GET /notifications?page=1&limit=20

item.name: Mark Notification Read
item.description: PATCH /notifications/:id/read

item.name: Mark All Notifications Read
item.description: POST /notifications/read-all
